zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Whittingham於大約1468年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾朋德利 曼諾時，她的父親Robert Whittingham111歲，母親Katherine Gatewyne109歲。她與Sir John Verney結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1509年4月21日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿爾德波利享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿爾德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Whittingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Whittingham (in Lancashire and Northumberland), Little Whittingham, now Little Whittingham Green (Suffolk), or less likely Whittinghame (East Lothian). The placenames probably mean ‘the homestead of the people of a man called Hwīta or Witta’, from the Old English personal name Hwīta (or Witta in the Suffolk name) + the Old English group name suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + hām ‘village, homestead’. The name may also derive from Wittenham (Berkshire), which is named from the Old English personal name Witta (genitive Wittan) + Old English hamm ‘water meadow’. This surname is also found in Wales.
History: Richand Whittingham and his son, also called Richard, brass founders from Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, came to New York City in 1791, where they established a successful business.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Whittingham was born about 1468, in Pendley Manor, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Whittingham, was 111 and her mother, Katherine Gatewyne, was 109. She married Sir John Verney. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 21 April 1509, in Aldbury, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Aldbury, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Whittingham est née environ 1468, à Pendley Manor, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Whittingham, avait 111 ans et sa mère, Katherine Gatewyne, avait 109 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Verney. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 21 avril 1509, à Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Aldbury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Whittinghamが約1468年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアペンドリー マノーで生まれた時，父Robert Whittinghamは111歳，母Katherine Gatewyneは109歳であった。Sir John Verneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1509年4月21日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルドブリーで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Whittingham(이)가 대략 1468년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 펜들리 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Whittingham(은)는 111세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Gatewyne(은)는 109세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Verney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1509년 4월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 알드버이에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 알드버이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Whittingham родилась около 1468 г. в местности пендли манор, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Whittingham было 111 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine Gatewyne, 109. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Verney. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 21 апреля 1509 г. в местности алдбури, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности алдбури, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
